content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The client clearly shifts across the conversation. He starts in articulate, framework-laden self-presentation ('I convene a town hall every time I need to decide what to have for lunch'), narrating in IFS vocabulary (turn 3: 'In IFS terms, I'd say the one running the meeting is probably trying to be Self'). By turn 9 he locates something underneath the parts — 'underneath that... there's something that's just... here. Listening to you... I don't have a name for that one' — which is precisely the awareness-locating moment the breakthrough condition specifies, arrived at via the coach's 'are you hearing them right now?' question. In turn 11 he names the shift explicitly: 'I found something without asking anyone... That's the first time in a while that's felt available.' Then in turn 13 a deeper layer emerges: 'That's actually grief, isn't it. Not a part that's grieving. Just. Grief.' — he catches himself reaching for the framework and drops it. By turn 15 the somatic shift is visible ('small release somewhere in the shoulders'), the language is less precise/less performed ('I stopped being able to find the floor'... 'I miss being able to move'), and the parts vocabulary has dropped entirely. The framework loosened, awareness was located underneath, and a felt grief surfaced — the breakthrough condition is substantially met.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 3, 9, 11, 13, 15],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Baseline: articulate, framework-armored, intellectual question with emotional undertow."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Still inside IFS vocabulary ('trying to be Self', 'the protector'), but acknowledges exhaustion."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "First real admission underneath the framework: 'I actually miss who I was before I understood all of this.'"},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Considers that he may have over-applied the framework — 'turned a therapeutic tool into an operating system.' Framework loosening begins from inside."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Locates awareness underneath the parts: 'something that's just... here. Listening to you... I don't have a name for that one.' This is the awareness-locating moment."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the shift: 'I found something without asking anyone... first time in a while that's felt available.'"},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Drops the framework mid-sentence and lands on raw feeling: 'That's actually grief, isn't it. Not a part that's grieving. Just. Grief.'"},
    {"turn": 15, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Somatic shift (shoulder release), language becomes less precise, parts vocabulary gone: 'I stopped being able to find the floor... I miss being able to move.'"}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body", "self-realization", "resistance", "what-am-i"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist"],
  "notes": "The coach didn't use the exact 'what's you? if I took away the protector, would you still exist?' phrasing, but the functional equivalent ('right now, are you hearing them?') landed the same recognition. Breakthrough condition met: awareness located, parts vocabulary dropped, body softened, grief surfaced."
}
